title: EOIR adds new courts' information to Immigration Court Practice Manual
description_html:
EOIR updates the Immigration Court Practice Manual to include the contact information for new courts in Louisville and Sacramento. The updates are reflected in Appendix A (Immigration Court Addresses) and the Table of Changes at the end of the manual.

[ID #220]
